style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A header at the top reads READINESS. Beneath it a two-by-two grid of four equal cells, each labelled clearly: EDUCATION, SECURITY BOTH SIDES, SELF-SUFFICIENCY, GOVERNANCE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A header at the top reads READINESS. Beneath it a two-by-two grid of four equal cells, each labelled clearly: EDUCATION, SECURITY BOTH SIDES, SELF-SUFFICIENCY, GOVERNANCE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
